testcase.name: test_evite_rsvp_premium

failure.message: Exception: Add Guest button failed to reset before attempting to add new guest

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_premium.TestEviteRSVPPremium object at 0x7fa9f5cf3a40> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fa9f56bd070>
def test_evite_rsvp_premium(self, config): _test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
page = config.pages["page"]
evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"]
rsvp_modal = config.pages["rsvp_modal"] event_details = config.pages["event_details"] who_is_coming = config.pages["who_is_coming"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"]
step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step2_event_details = config.pages["step2_event_details"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"] step6_review_send = config.pages["step6_review_send"]
quake_v3_event = QuakeV3Event(_test_name) psql_db = PostgreSQL(_test_name)
# Logger logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(_test_name) logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
page.get_url(environment=config.environment)
# Sign-In or Register user_email_addr, user_pass, host = login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data)
# Create Invitation evite_gallery_page = evite_home_page.select_nav("create_invitation") evite_gallery_page.select_filter_by(["premium"])
# Pick up a random template from the template page evite_gallery_page.select_random_template(premium=True)
self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["event_title"] = Utils().get_event_title() self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_date"] = Utils().get_rand_date(test_name=_test_name) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_time"] = Utils().get_start_time(premium=True) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = ( f"{self._json_test_data['register']['first_name']} " f"{self._json_test_data['register']['last_name']}" )
# Step 1: Card Editor step1_template.fill_text_editors(test_data=self._json_test_data) step1_template.select_next(url="details")
# Step 2: Enter Details page step2_event_details.enter_details(test_data=self._json_test_data) step1_template.select_next(url="gifting") step1_template.select_next(url="preview")
step1_template.select_next(url="guests") > step5_guests.add_guests(test_data=self._json_test_data["guests"])
_test_name = 'test_evite_rsvp_premium' config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fa9f56bd070> event_details = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_event_details_module.EventDetailsModule object at 0x7fa9f56bc920> evite_gallery_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_gallery_page.EviteGalleryPage object at 0x7fa9f56919d0> evite_home_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_home_page.EviteHomePage object at 0x7fa9f56be480> host = 'automation test' logger = <Logger test_evite_rsvp_premium (INFO)> login_modal = <commons.pages.evite.login_modal.LoginModal object at 0x7fa9f56bd6a0> my_events = <commons.pages.evite.my_events.MyEvents object at 0x7fa9f56bcad0> page = <commons.page.Page object at 0x7fa9f56be4e0> psql_db = <lib.postgre_sql.PostgreSQL object at 0x7faa135eaba0> quake_v3_event = <commons.pages.quake_v3.quake_v3_event.QuakeV3Event object at 0x7fa9f5d92240> rsvp_modal = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_rsvp_modal.RSVPModal object at 0x7fa9f56bcf80> self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_premium.TestEviteRSVPPremium object at 0x7fa9f5cf3a40> step1_template = <commons.pages.evite.step1_template.Step1Template object at 0x7fa9f56be270> step2_event_details = <commons.pages.evite.step2_event_details.Step2EventDetails object at 0x7fa9f56bd460> step5_guests = <commons.pages.evite.step5_guests.Step5Guests object at 0x7fa9f56bd520> step6_review_send = <commons.pages.evite.step6_review_send.Step6ReviewSend object at 0x7fa9f56bd4f0> user_email_addr = 'evite-02092026-112555-90-test@evitetest.com' user_pass = 'test1234' who_is_coming = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_whos_coming_module.WhosComingModule object at 0x7fa9f56be000>
